lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈਸੇ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਬ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaise boojhai jab mohiaa hai maaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: How can people understand You, when they are entranced by Maya? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਤੈਂ ਜਗੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa tain jag bharam laaeaa |
lines.english: You have misled the world so deeply in doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਮਈਆ ਜਪਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਅਨਤ ਜੀਵਣ ਬਾਣੀ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rameea japahu praanee anat jeevan baanee in bidh bhav saagar taranaa |2|
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, O mortal being, through the Word of His Bani; you shall be blessed with eternal life. In this way, shall you cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਛੋਡਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਸ ਇਤੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਹਚਉ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer chhodd bikhiaa ras it sangat nihchau maranaa |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, give up the pleasures of corruption, or else you will surely die of them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਭੁਲਾਵਾ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bharam bhulaavaa vichahu jaae |
lines.english: and doubt and delusion are dispelled from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaan tis bhaavai taa laagai bhaau |
lines.english: As it pleases Him, people embrace love for the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਜੈ ਸਹਜੁ ਗਿਆਨ ਮਤਿ ਜਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: aupajai sehaj giaan mat jaagai |
lines.english: Intuitive peace and poise well up within, and the intellect is awakened to spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad antar liv laagai |3|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the inner being is touched by the Lord's Love. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: eit sangat naahee maranaa |
lines.english: In this association, there is no death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag trilochan kaa |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Trilochan:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿ ਤਾ ਖਸਮੈ ਮਿਲਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: hukam pachhaan taa khasamai milanaa |1| rahaau doojaa |
lines.english: Recognizing the Hukam of His Command, you shall meet with your Lord and Master. ||1||Second Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਨਿ ਆਗਲੜਾ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਜਰਾ ਮਰਣੁ ਭਉ ਵਿਸਰਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu man aagalarraa praanee jaraa maran bhau visar geaa |
lines.english: The mind is totally attached to Maya; the mortal has forgotten his fear of old age and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਬਿਗਸਹਿ ਕਮਲਾ ਜਿਉ ਪਰ ਘਰਿ ਜੋਹਹਿ ਕਪਟ ਨਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kuttanb dekh bigaseh kamalaa jiau par ghar joheh kapatt naraa |1|
lines.english: Gazing upon his family, he blossoms forth like the lotus flower; the deceitful person watches and covets the homes of others. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਆਗਲੜੈ ਮੈ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin aagalarrai mai rehan na jaae |
lines.english: No one can stand against his awesome power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂੜਾ ਆਇਓਹਿ ਜਮਹਿ ਤਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: doorraa aaeohi jameh tanaa |
lines.english: When the powerful Messenger of Death comes,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਕੋਈ ਸਾਜਣੁ ਆਇ ਕਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: koee koee saajan aae kahai |
lines.english: Rare, very rare, is that friend who comes and says,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਬੀਠੁਲਾ ਲੈ ਬਾਹੜੀ ਵਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil mere beetthulaa lai baaharree valaae |
lines.english: "O my Beloved, take me into Your Embrace!

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਭੋਗ ਰਾਜ ਬਿਸਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਪੈ ਅਮਰੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: anik anik bhog raaj bisare praanee sansaar saagar pai amar bheaa |
lines.english: Indulging in all sorts of princely pleasures, O mortal, you have forgotten God; you have fallen into the world-ocean, and you think that you have become immortal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਰਮਈਆ ਮੈ ਲੇਹਿ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil mere rameea mai lehi chhaddaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O my Lord, please save me!" ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੂਠਾ ਚੇਤਸਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਓ ਆਲਸੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mootthaa chetas naahee janam gavaaeo aalaseea |2|
lines.english: Cheated and plundered by Maya, you do not think of God, and you waste your life in laziness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਤਬ ਬਿਸਰਿ ਗਇਆ ਜਾਂ ਤਜੀਅਲੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu tab bisar geaa jaan tajeeale sansaaran |3|
lines.english: Your emotional attachment to Maya will be forgotten, when you have to leave this world. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਮ ਘੋਰ ਪੰਥਿ ਚਾਲਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਤਹ ਨ ਪ੍ਰਵੇਸੰ ॥
lines.translit: bikham ghor panth chaalanaa praanee rav sas teh na pravesan |
lines.english: The path you must walk is treacherous and terrifying, O mortal; neither the sun nor the moon shine there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਭਇਆ ਹੈ ਪੇਖੀਅਲੇ ਧਰਮਰਾਓ ॥
lines.translit: aaj merai man pragatt bheaa hai pekheeale dharamaraao |
lines.english: Today, it became clear to my mind that the Righteous Judge of Dharma is watching us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਮੂੰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਰਤੁ ਹੈ ਤਾ ਵਣਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਣਿ ਰਤੜਾ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: je ko moon upades karat hai taa van trin ratarraa naaraaeinaa |
lines.english: If someone is going to teach me something, let it be that the Lord is pervading the forests and fields.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਕਰ ਦਲ ਕਰਨਿ ਮਹਾਬਲੀ ਤਿਨ ਆਗਲੜੈ ਮੈ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: teh kar dal karan mahaabalee tin aagalarrai mai rehan na jaae |4|
lines.english: His messengers, with their awesome power, crush people between their hands; I cannot stand against them. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐ ਜੀ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਬਦਤਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਰਾਮਈਆ ॥੫॥੨॥
lines.translit: ai jee toon aape sabh kichh jaanadaa badat trilochan raameea |5|2|
lines.english: O Dear Lord, You Yourself know everything; so prays Trilochan, Lord. ||5||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਗਣ ਗੰਧ੍ਰਬ ਜਿਨਿ ਮੋਹੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਮੇਖੁਲੀ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sur nar gan gandhrab jin mohe tribhavan mekhulee laaee |1|
lines.english: He fascinates the angels, the celestial singers and the heavenly musicians; he has strung the three worlds upon His Thread. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰਜ ਏਕੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਰੇ ਪੰਡੀਆ ਅਬ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: acharaj ek sunahu re panddeea ab kichh kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: Listen, O religious scholar: the One Lord alone is Wondrous; no one can describe Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਭਗਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: sreeraag bhagat kabeer jeeo kaa |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Devotee Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਨਾਦ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee disatt naad liv laagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: by His Glance of Grace, we are lovingly attuned to the Sound-current of the Naad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ਅਨਹਦ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਬਾਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raajaa raam anahad kinguree baajai |
lines.english: The Unstruck Melody of the Sovereign Lord's Harp vibrates;

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਠੀ ਗਗਨੁ ਸਿੰਙਿਆ ਅਰੁ ਚੁੰਙਿਆ ਕਨਕ ਕਲਸ ਇਕੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaatthee gagan singiaa ar chungiaa kanak kalas ik paaeaa |
lines.english: The Tenth Gate of my crown chakra is the distilling fire, and the channels of the Ida and Pingala are the funnels, to pour in and empty out the golden vat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਧਾਰ ਚੁਐ ਅਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਰਸਨ ਚੁਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis meh dhaar chuai at niramal ras meh rasan chuaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Into that vat, there trickles a gentle stream of the most sublime and pure essence of all distilled essences. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਜੁ ਬਾਤ ਅਨੂਪ ਬਨੀ ਹੈ ਪਵਨ ਪਿਆਲਾ ਸਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek ju baat anoop banee hai pavan piaalaa saajiaa |
lines.english: Something wonderful has happened-the breath has become the cup.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿਆ ਪੁਰਖੋਤਮ ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aise giaan pragattiaa purakhotam kahu kabeer rang raataa |
lines.english: This spiritual wisdom of God, the Supreme Soul, has illuminated my being. Says Kabeer, I am attuned to His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਭਵਨ ਮਹਿ ਏਕੋ ਜੋਗੀ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਵਨੁ ਹੈ ਰਾਜਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: teen bhavan meh eko jogee kahahu kavan hai raajaa |3|
lines.english: In all the three worlds, such a Yogi is unique. What king can compare to him? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਰ ਦੁਨੀ ਸਭ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਨੀ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਨ ਮਾਤਾ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: aaur dunee sabh bharam bhulaanee man raam rasaaein maataa |4|3|
lines.english: All the rest of the world is deluded by doubt, while my mind is intoxicated with the Sublime Essence of the Lord. ||4||3||
